title: edritria supina
intro: Edritria supina, also known as the spreading knotweed or winterknotweed, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Edritria supina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Edritria supina can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves.
